The month's densest binaries resolved benignly (cool June CPI, broad bank beats, benign tape-inferred PPI, a passed monthly OPEX), the fat left tail is gone, and the index still holds — SPY above its 50-day, VIX low and flat at 17.11. But the crowd is NOT chasing the leadership and the internals are fraying: QQQ slipped further below its 50-day (no bull-stack), MSFT followed through lower below its own, and profits keep leaving the still-heavy semis complex internally (SOXX 0/12 members up-momentum, 3/12 above their 50-day, rsMom1m -15.84) even as its headline RS holds Leading. Money rotates into energy (XLE Leading, rsMom 102.21 board-best) while XLK's RS has softened below 100 (Basing up) and the earlier defensive bid is mixed (XLRE Peaking, XLP/XLY Lagging). The subtle danger is COMPLACENCY dressed as a reclaim: the crowd treats SPY's held 50-day and a low, flat VIX as an all-clear on the Fed while the 7/29 hike tail (carried ~46.5%, STALE/UNVERIFIED) stays a live two-way risk into still-unverified demand data — the underpriced near-term asymmetry.
